/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libpegasus_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libpegasus_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/pegasus_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/pegasus_msgs/msg/detail/defect_detection__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/pegasus_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/pegasus_msgs/msg/detail/defect_array__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/pegasus_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/pegasus_msgs/msg/detail/inspection_result__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/pegasus_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/pegasus_msgs/msg/detail/zone_info__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/pegasus_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/pegasus_msgs/msg/detail/node_health__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libsensor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
